author: doll-agent
content: Implemented fill-value protocol: per-type defaults (default_fill_value_f64=1e20, default_fill_value_f32=1e20, default_fill_value_bool=false, default_fill_value_i64=999_999), maximum_fill_value::<T: Float>() returning Float::infinity (used when filling masked positions for max-reductions so they don't influence the result), minimum_fill_value::<T>() returning Float::neg_infinity, and common_fill_value(a, b) which returns a's fill_value when both share it else T::zero (numpy fallback). MaskedArray::set_fill_value already exists as an inherent method. The 'object dtype' default value (None) isn't representable in our generic type system.
